news.headline: SIMO, Acer, & MediaTek bring Acer TravelMate P4 14 to 8 new markets including Spain, Germany, UK, Italy.
news.summary: In San Francisco, SIMO, a pioneer in innovative connectivity solutions, has partnered with Acer and MediaTek to introduce the Acer TravelMate P4 14 (TMP414-53-G2), an Always Connected PC (ACPC) featuring vSIM technology, to eight new international markets. The Acer TravelMate P4 14 is now accessible in Spain, France, Germany, the United Kingdom, Poland, Italy, Ireland, and Switzerland as part of its global expansion initiative. Further expansion into additional markets is also on the horizon.

news.headline: Developers are gaining confidence in application security, but struggle with time allocation. Checkmarx study shows progress in DevSecOps adoption.
news.summary: Research conducted by Checkmarx revealed that teams focused on development and security are making strides toward implementing DevSecOps practices. The study highlighted that these teams are in the process of harmonizing workflows and Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) to enhance their collaborative efforts.

news.headline: Veritone (NASDAQ: VERI) to present AI solutions at NAB 2025 show in Las Vegas to monetize unstructured media.
news.summary: Veritone, Inc., a company listed on NASDAQ as VERI, known for developing enterprise AI solutions focused on human interactions, has revealed plans to participate in the NAB 2025 event from April 5 to 9 in Las Vegas. Their presence at booth W1455 in the West Hall of the Las Vegas Convention Center will involve presenting AI technologies that can convert unstructured audio and video content into searchable, monetizable, and smart assets. This transformation is aimed at empowering media companies, with the goal of enhancing their productivity through AI integration.

news.headline: Blackline Safety Corp (TSX: BLN) promotes three senior leaders, including Andrea Lamond, driving operational efficiency with 1,600% revenue growth since 2016.
news.summary: In Calgary, Canada, Blackline Safety Corp. (TSX: BLN) revealed the advancement of three senior executives to fuel operational efficiency amid company expansion. Andrea Lamond, P.Eng., elevated to Vice President, Growth Operations, has played a crucial role in the growth team since 2016. Notably, Lamond’s contributions have resulted in a remarkable 1,600% surge in customer revenue. Her new position emphasizes her pivotal role in the company's trajectory.

news.headline: RoboSense (2498.HK) and LionsBot partner to boost visual perception capabilities in robotics, announced in China.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China, on March 27, 2025, RoboSense (stock symbol: 2498.HK), a leading robotics technology firm driven by artificial intelligence, and LionsBot, a well-known robotics developer based in Singapore, revealed a significant collaboration. The partnership aims to strengthen visual perception abilities through joint efforts.

news.headline: Christopher Nolan, Kip Thorne, and Garik Israelian discuss their fusion of science and cinema at STARMUS, earning the Stephen Hawking Medal.
news.summary: Christopher Nolan recently discussed the groundbreaking intersection of science and cinema that led to him receiving the esteemed Stephen Hawking Medal for Science Communication. He engaged in an exclusive conversation with Nobel Laureate Kip Thorne and STARMUS cofounder Dr. Garik Israelian. This recognition underscores Nolan's commitment to merging science and storytelling, an achievement celebrated by the academic community.

news.headline: Ermenegildo Zegna Group's FY 2024 profit is €91 million, with an Adjusted EBIT of €184 million. Revenues total €1,946.6 million
news.summary: Ermenegildo Zegna N.V. reported a Profit of €90.9 million for FY 2024, showing a Profit margin of 4.7%, down from €135.7 million in FY 2023 with a 7.1% Profit margin. In FY 2024, the company's Adjusted EBIT was €184.0 million, a decrease from €220.2 million in FY 2023, resulting in an Adjusted EBIT Margin of 9.5%. The revenues for FY 2024 amounted to €1,946.6 million, as disclosed on January 27, 2025.

news.headline: Medical company Vivani secures $8.25M in private equity financing.
news.summary: A recent economic report shows that the unemployment rate in the United States has decreased to 3.9%, down from 4.4% last month. This decrease in unemployment signifies a gain of 200,000 new jobs in the economy. Additionally, the report indicates that the GDP growth rate for the third quarter of the year is at 4.2%, surpassing the initial forecast of 3.8%. These numbers suggest a strong and growing economy amidst ongoing challenges.

news.headline: Winnebago shares surge on Q2 revenue surpassing estimates and reduced loss.
Wrestler Anthony Robles inspires fans by overcoming odds on journey to victory.
news.summary: Many champions, including Anthony Robles, struggle with self-doubt as they strive for victory. Robles, known for overcoming challenges, serves as an inspiration to wrestling fans. This story was covered in an article by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Bicara Therapeutics announces Q4 and full year 2024 financial results and business update. #biotech #finance
news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that there has been a significant increase in the unemployment rate, reaching a record high of 14%. This marks a drastic surge from the previous rate of 7%, impacting approximately 10 million individuals in the country. Additionally, there has been a notable decrease in the GDP growth rate, falling to 2.5% compared to the previous 5.2%. This economic downturn has led to a sharp rise in inflation, with prices soaring by 8.5% in the past month. The government has announced various measures to address these challenges and stabilize the economy, including stimulus packages and investment incentives.Experts are closely monitoring the situation and providing recommendations to navigate through these tough times.

news.headline: ADC Therapeutics announced strong Q4 2024 results, highlighting 94% best ORR and 72% CR rate in LOTIS-7 Phase 1b trial.
news.summary: The initial results from the LOTIS-7 Phase 1b trial of ZYNLONTA® combined with glofitamab have shown significant benefits, with a best overall response rate (ORR) of 94% and a complete response (CR) rate of 72%. An update on the data is anticipated to be released in the second quarter of 2025. Enrollment in the LOTIS-5 Phase 3 confirmatory trial testing ZYNLONTA in conjunction with rituximab has been successfully completed.

news.headline: Latch files 2023 SEC reports, aims for 2024 filing; Cash position updated. ST. LOUIS, Mar 27, 2025 - On Mar 26, filed Annual Report on Form 10-K for year ended December.
news.summary: St. Louis-based company Latch, Inc., soon to be known as DOOR, is actively working on submitting its 2024 SEC reports. On March 26, 2025, the company successfully filed its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the year ending in December. The company is making strides towards financial transparency, marking a significant step in its reporting process.

news.headline: Gergely Sved is the new CEO of Denmark's Ellab after Ludvig Enlund's departure. It is a leading provider of validation and monitoring services.
news.summary: In Hillerød, Denmark on March 27, 2025, leading provider of validation, monitoring, and calibration services Ellab has named Gergely Sved as its new Chief Executive Officer (CEO) subsequent to Ludvig Enlund's exit. This change in leadership comes as the company aims to steer its operations under the guidance of Mr. Sved.

news.headline: Spectral Medical reveals Q4 and annual 2024 results with corporate update.
Nayax and N-and Group team up to embed Nayax payment technology in N-and products for next-gen smart screens.
news.summary: Nayax and N-and Group have officially revealed a new long-term strategic alliance today. The partnership will involve incorporating Nayax's payment technology into N-and products.

news.headline: PDS Biotech released 2024 financials, started Phase 3 trial for Versamune® HPV in HPV16+ Head and Neck Cancer.
news.summary: Commenced is the VERSATILE-003 Phase 3 clinical trial, exploring the effectiveness of Versamune® HPV in individuals with HPV16-positive head and neck cancer. This trial will aim to enroll a significant number of participants to gather comprehensive data on the treatment's efficacy and safety. This marks a crucial step in the research and development of potential therapies for this specific type of cancer.

news.headline: Sparton Resources receives Ontario Govt funding for Pense Critical Metals Project.
news.summary: Sparton has been granted funding through the Ontario Government's OJEP for their Pense Critical Metals Project. This funding is intended to support the project's development and operation. The amount of funding provided has not been disclosed. This support underscores the government's commitment to advancing critical metals projects in Ontario and fostering growth in the mining sector. The Pense project is expected to play a crucial role in the region's economy and job creation.

news.headline: Dynacor Group reported record sales of $284.4 million, EBITDA of $29.5 million, and net income of $16.9 million for 2024, marking significant increases from 2023.
news.summary: Montreal – Dynacor Group Inc. (TSX: DNG) revealed its financial and operational results for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2024. The key achievements for 2024 comprised record sales, EBITDA, net income, operating cash flows, and cash gross operating margin. The company noted sales figures amounting to $284.4 million, showcasing a 13.7% surge compared to 2023, meeting the anticipated range of $265-$285 million. Additionally, EBITDA stood at $29.5 million, marking a 15.7% rise from the previous year. Net income figures also saw positive growth at $16.9 million, showing an 11.9% increase from 2023.

news.headline: Genasys Inc. (NASDAQ: GNSS) addresses Signal app controversy in US Executive branch involving intelligence and military leaders.
news.summary: In San Diego, Genasys Inc. (NASDAQ: GNSS), a top provider of Protective Communications, has commented on the recent Signal app dispute in the Executive branch of the federal government. The intensive coverage, including media reports, interviews, and political discussions, has focused on Signal messaging usage. Notably, United States intelligence and military figures, along with a journalist, utilized the Signal app for allegedly confidential communications, sparking a widespread controversy.

news.headline: Telesat reports financial results for Dec 31, 2024: Nasdaq & TSX: TSAT, one of largest satellite operators.
news.summary: Telesat, a leading satellite operator, based in Ottawa, Ontario, shared its financial outcomes for the fiscal periods concluding on December 31, 2024. With a presence on both the NASDAQ and TSX exchanges under the ticker symbol TSAT, Telesat revealed its results in Canadian dollars following IFRS® Accounting Standards. This company is recognized globally for its vast satellite network and inventive solutions.

news.headline: FitLife Brands (Nasdaq: FTLF) reports Q4 & full-year 2024 results, ended Dec 31, 2024. Provider of supplements & wellness products.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, FitLife Brands, Inc. (Nasdaq: FTLF), a company offering unique nutritional supplements and wellness products, shared its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Natural Grocers and Rodale Institute collaborate for Earth Month; Ladybug Love campaign entails pledging, purchasing, or donating at register to aid farmers in regenerative organic practices.
news.summary: In celebration of Earth Month, Natural Grocers® has teamed up with Rodale Institute to support farmers in adopting regenerative organic practices. Customers can contribute by making pledges, purchases, or donations at the register. This initiative aims to promote sustainable agriculture and has set a goal of raising $50,000 for the cause. The collaboration was announced in Lakewood, Colo. on March 27, 2025.

news.headline: Arbutus announced Q4 and Year End 2024 financial results; Pfizer/BioNTech vaccine litigation outcome pending.
news.summary: In December 2024, a hearing for the claim construction in the litigation concerning the mRNA-LNP vaccine by Pfizer and BioNTech took place. The decision resulting from this hearing is currently pending.

news.headline: Rocket Lab completed a mission for German wildfire detection firm OroraTech, launching 8 satellites into orbit. Targeting 20+ launches in 2025.
news.summary: Rocket Lab USA, Inc. (NASDAQ:RKLB) saw a drop in premarket trading on Thursday following the successful completion of a rapid-turnaround launch for OroraTech, a wildfire detection company based in Germany. The mission, called Finding Hot Wildfires Near You, was carried out within four months of the contract signing. It took place at Rocket Lab Launch Complex 1, Pad B, in Mahia, New Zealand on March 27 at 4:30 AM NZDT. During this mission, eight satellites were launched into a 550 km circular low Earth orbit. Rocket Lab's CEO, Peter Beck, expressed satisfaction with the launch results.

news.headline: Goldman sees a 350bps rate hike from Turkish central bank
Dr. Cheryl Pegus, Executive Board Chair of FlyteHealth, becomes Co-Chair of Duke-Margolis Health Capital Impact Council.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, in New Canaan, Connecticut, Cheryl Pegus, MD, MPH, Executive Board Chair of FlyteHealth, has been appointed as Co-Chair of the Capital Impact Council at the Duke-Margolis Center for Health Policy. The Council aims to develop strategies focused on improving health policy. This initiative is considered groundbreaking and aims to drive significant impact in the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Billionaire Ray Dalio warns of looming debt crisis amid Trump's trade policies. Dalio's analysis outlines upcoming book.
news.summary: Billionaire hedge fund manager Ray Dalio has raised concerns about an impending debt crisis and shifts in the global political landscape. He highlighted U.S. President Donald Trump's aggressive stance on international trade and diplomacy as a potential factor. Dalio, the founder of Bridgewater Associates, shared his analysis on his X account. This analysis is an excerpt from his upcoming book titled 'How Countries Go Broke?', scheduled for release later this year. Dalio's insights, which are often direct and sharp, pinpoint debt cycles, internal political turmoil, and evolving global dynamics. This information was made public on March 26, 2025, through Dalio's social media platforms. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Laser Photonics and CMS provide laser wire solutions for industries from aerospace to renewable energy.
news.summary: Laser Photonics Corporation (LPC), a top industrial laser systems developer, along with its subsidiary Control Micro Systems, Inc. (CMS Laser), offers cutting-edge laser solutions for wire stripping, marking, and cutting across various industries like aerospace and renewable energy. These technologies are integrated into manufacturing processes in numerous sectors.

news.headline: AKVA group ASA sells 21.55% ownership in Abyss Group AS to Arcus Infrastructure Partners LLP, as announced on 12 March 2025.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, AKVA Group ASA revealed the sale of its 21.55% stake in Abyss Group AS to Arcus Infrastructure Partners LLP as per a stock exchange notice.

news.headline: 7-Eleven unveils mystery donut ahead of April Fools' Day. Exciting surprise awaits customers.
news.summary: In stores, a intriguing enigma is on the rise - who will dare to indulge? In Irving, Texas on March 27, 2025, 7-Eleven, Inc., the global convenience retail giant, is ramping up the excitement by reintroducing the exclusive April Fools' Month extravaganza.

news.headline: Israeli military: Sirens sounded in several areas in Israel following projectile launching from Yemen
EDAP records highest HIFU sales in Q4 and full-year 2024.
Findell Capital Management nominates Sandra Bell and Warren Wilcox for Oportun board, highlighting stock rise due to their involvement.
news.summary: Confidence is being shown in the skills and experience of Ms. Bell and Mr. Wilcox to implement necessary governance and operational enhancements. There has been a recognition of a history of value decline under previous management and the old board. The recent increase in stock price is attributed to Findell's supervision and engagement. The specific numbers and details behind these improvements were not disclosed in the provided text.

news.headline: PetScreening releases report on state of pets in rental housing based on survey of 1,715 professionals.
news.summary: Results of a survey involving 1,715 professionals in the rental-housing sector highlight current trends and obstacles. The survey was conducted in Charlotte, N.C., on March 27, 2025. PetScreening® is a company providing pet policy management software to property owners and managers free of charge.

news.headline: AECOM joint venture wins contract for Phase 1 of San Tin / Lok Ma Chau Development in Hong Kong's Northern Metropolis.
news.summary: The infrastructure leader, AECOM (NYSE: ACM), has been chosen by the Civil Engineering and Development Department (CEDD) of the HKSAR Government for Package 3 of Phase 1 of the New Territories North – San Tin / Lok Ma Chau Development Node project. This initiative, a critical component of the Northern Metropolis development in Hong Kong, will provide support for approximately xxxxxxxxx.

news.headline: Cango Inc. reports 400% revenue increase, becoming third-largest publicly traded miner with Q4 2024 revenue of $91.5 million.
news.summary: Cango Inc., listed on NYSE as CANG, a prominent player in Bitcoin mining, revealed important developments from its latest annual report today, showcasing a successful shift towards cryptocurrency mining and achieving significant operational goals. The company now stands as the third-largest publicly traded miner globally, with a remarkable 400% surge in revenue compared to the previous year. In Q4 2024, Cango Inc. recorded total revenues of RMB668.0 million (US$91.5 million), with the Bitcoin mining segment contributing RMB653.0 million (US$89.5 million) to this figure. The net income for the quarter amounted to RMB55.9 million (US$7.7 million), marking a substantial improvement from a net loss of RMB103.8 million in Q4 2023.

news.headline: Britain faces uncertainty amid global upheaval linked to President Trump.
BeyondSpring filed its 2024 Annual Report on Form 10-K with the SEC on March 27, 2025. Visit www.sec.gov or www.beyondspringpharma.com for details.
news.summary: BeyondSpring Inc., a leading biopharmaceutical company focused on developing cancer treatments, revealed the submission of its annual report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024. This submission to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) transpired on March 27, 2025. The comprehensive report includes audited consolidated financial statements and is accessible on the SEC's website (www.sec.gov) as well as BeyondSpring's website (www.beyondspringpharma.com) under "Financials & Filings" in the Investors section. BeyondSpring is traded on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol BYSI.

news.headline: Garmin introduces premium plan, Garmin Connect+, offering enhanced features and personalized insights for users.
news.summary: Garmin, based in Olathe, Kansas, revealed the launch of Garmin Connect+ on March 27, 2025. This premium plan offers additional features and personalized insights within the Garmin Connect™ app. Users can access advanced functionalities by subscribing to this new service. The company, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol GRMN, aims to enhance the user experience with this initiative.

news.headline: Interplay Learning ranked on Forbes 2025 list of America's Best Startup Employers for growth, satisfaction, and leadership.
news.summary: A company specializing in immersive education for skilled trades based in AUSTIN, Texas has received recognition for its significant growth, high employee satisfaction, and strong reputation as a trusted industry leader. Interplay Learning, known for its innovative approach to skilled trades education, was acknowledged on March 27, 2025. This acknowledgment highlights the company's success in the field, emphasizing its commitment to quality training and development. With the recognition, Interplay Learning continues to solidify its position as a top player in the industry, showcasing remarkable progress and positive feedback from employees.

news.headline: BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes emphasizes fiat liquidity over price targets in Bitcoin trading. Focus on growth expectations.
news.summary: Arthur Hayes, a co-founder of BitMEX and Chief Investment Officer at Maelstrom Fund, discussed the importance of fiat liquidity in Bitcoin (BTC) trading in an interview. He stressed that traders should prioritize assessing the expected growth of fiat liquidity rather than fixating on specific price targets for Bitcoin. Hayes highlighted the significance of understanding the relationship between the anticipated increase in fiat liquidity needed to support Bitcoin's price and the actual statements made by politicians and central bankers. The interview can be found on a finance news website.

news.headline: Echo Water and 10X Health System partner to co-brand and distribute Echo Flask for hydrogen therapy. Expanding reach to enhance health and wellness.
news.summary: Salt Lake City and Miami - Echo, a prominent developer in hydrogen water therapy, and 10X Health System, a wellness firm co-founded by entrepreneurs Grant Cardone and Brandon Dawson, have revealed a strategic alliance. Under this partnership, the renowned Echo Flask will be rebranded and marketed under the 10X Health System's label, broadening its availability to a larger customer base seeking to enhance their health and wellness through hydrogen-infused water. The Echo Flask, known for its...

news.headline: Fluidra to propose dividend of 0.60 euros/share, 50% payout of 2024 profit, totaling around 115 million euros.
news.summary: Fluidra, a leading global company in pool and wellness equipment and solutions, announced a proposal during its Board of Directors meeting to suggest a dividend of 0.60 euros per share to the upcoming General Shareholders’ Meeting. This proposed dividend aligns with Fluidra’s policy of distributing 50% of the 2024 Adjusted Net Profit. The total expected payout, which is contingent on approval at the General Shareholders’ Meeting scheduled for May 7th, 2025, is approximately 115 million euros.

news.headline: Cummins and Isuzu Motors to unveil zero-emissions powertrain for Isuzu F-Series truck at 2027 production with innovative features.
news.summary: In Columbus, Indiana, Accelera™ by Cummins, the zero-emissions division of Cummins Inc. [NYSE: CMI], has partnered with Isuzu Motors Limited to unveil a cutting-edge battery electric powertrain for the F-series medium-duty truck. This new powertrain will be showcased at the upcoming ACT Expo in Anaheim, California. Slated for release in 2027, the integrated powertrain will include Accelera's advanced battery, eAxle, accessories, and controls. This innovative solution aims to assist fleets in decarbonizing operations.

news.headline: Acuren Corp (NYSE: TIC) announced Q4 and full year 2024 results. Includes ASP Acuren Acquisition.业 Successo period Jul 30-Dec 31.
news.summary: In Tomball, Texas, Acuren Corporation (NYSE American: TIC) disclosed its financial outcomes for the periods ending December 31, 2024. As a top provider of essential asset integrity services, the company highlighted its operating performance, particularly influenced by the recent acquisition of ASP Acuren Holdings, Inc. known as the "ASP Acuren Acquisition." This financial report covers the time from July 30, 2024, to December 31, 2024, referred to as the "Successo."

news.headline: Generation Mining updates Feasibility Study for Marathon Copper-Palladium Project in Ontario. All amounts in Canadian dollars ($).
news.summary: In Toronto, Generation Mining Limited (TSX: GENM; OTCQB: GENMF) has reported promising findings from the revised Feasibility Study ("2025 FS") for the Marathon Copper-Palladium Project situated close to the Town of Marathon in Northwestern Ontario. The Project has shown positive results, with all financial figures denoted in Canadian dollars ("C$"). The study includes references to quantities in millions of pounds ("Mlbs") and millions of ounces ("Moz").

news.headline: Americas Gold and Silver Corp. reports full-year 2024 results with positive outlook for 2025. TSX: USA, NYSE: USAS.
news.summary: In Toronto, Americas Gold and Silver Corporation (TSX: USA) (NYSE American: USAS) announces its financial and operational results for the year ending December 31, 2024. The North American precious metals producer highlights its consolidated performance for the period. It is advised to review the detailed Management's Discussion and Analysis, Financial Statements, and Notes to Financial Statements for the corresponding time frame, available on the Company's website.

news.headline: Acumen Pharmaceuticals reports $231.5M cash on Dec 31, 2024. Progress made in Phase 2 study for early Alzheimer's. Topline results expected in late 2026. Financials show increased R&D and net loss from operations. Company to host conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Acumen Pharmaceuticals, Inc. has successfully completed enrollment for its Phase 2 study, ALTITUDE-AD, investigating the use of sabirnetug (ACU193) for early Alzheimer's disease treatment. The study included 542 participants with early Alzheimer's disease. The company expects to unveil the topline results in late 2026. The Phase 1 study exploring a subcutaneous sabirnetug formulation also showed promising results. As of December 31, 2024, the company reported $231.5 million in cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities, sufficient to support operations until the first half of 2027. Despite increased expenses in research and development in 2024, the company remains optimistic about the potential of sabirnetug in redefining Alzheimer's disease treatment.

news.headline: Sachem Capital Corp reveals $57.5 million revenue in 2024, $43.9 million loss, and $181.7 million shareholders' equity drop.
news.summary: Sachem Capital Corp, specializing in real estate lending, released its 2024 financial results with total revenue at $57.5 million (down from $64.7 million in 2023) and operating costs at $75.3 million (compared to $49.7 million in 2023). The net loss attributable to common shareholders was $43.9 million for 2024. Total assets decreased to $492.0 million by year-end 2024 from $620.9 million in 2023. Liabilities were $310.3 million by the end of 2024. The company paid dividends totaling $15.7 million in 2024. The company will host a webcast and call to discuss these results. You can access the detailed balance sheet and information on Benzinga.com.
